Defendant Nelson Kwans Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Amanda Lyons And Dustin Lyons Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter

DEFENDANT NELSON KWAN's Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Amanda Lyons And Dustin Lyons Complaint is off calendar only as to Dept. 302. Transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at 9:30 a.m.

Defendant Nelson Kwans Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Amanda Lyons And Dustin Lyons Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: (Court call)
Stephanie E Stupakis,0415.463.8119 for Plaintiff Amanda Lyons.
Laurie C. Book, 562.216.500 for Defendant Nelson Kwan.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Nelson Kwans Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Amanda Lyons And Dustin Lyons Complaint is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
